title: 🖥️ Devices
description: Our lab's servers are equipped with 5 RTX 4090 GPUs and 128GB of RAM, providing each student with an individual account, supporting SSH remote connections, high concurrency, and high responsiveness to meet the research and experimental needs of every student.

title: 🛠️ Requirements
description:
If you are interested in the following topics and are passionate about learning medical AI knowledge, please prepare your Personal Materials.
The materials are included but not limited to your Resume, Award Certificates, and Research Experience, as evidence of your comprehensive abilities.

Our research topics are as following:
  • Medical Image Segmentation, Detection, and Registration
  • Early Alzheimer's Disease Computer-aided Diagnosis
  • Cross-modal and Multimodal Medical Image Analysis
  • ECG Classification and Computer-aided Diagnosis
  • Federated Learning for Medical AI

title: 📮 Contact
description: If meeting our requirements, and you are willing to join us. Please prepare your personal materials and contact our tutor YangLi via email. The mail is yangli@zstu.edu.cn
